title: Astebreed: Definitive Edition
notes: Joypad works, 60fps, everything seemingly ok after some sound glitches during game bootup.

title: Astebreed: Definitive Edition
notes: Can have issues with steam controller and rebinding right stick possibly due to deadzone issues. Issue can be worked around by temporarily disabling the left stick, which allows you to bind the right stick. Performs well, with 100% GPU utilisation on this modest GPU.

gpu: X.Org Radeon RX 580 Series (POLARIS10, DRM 3.23.0, 4.15.0-34-generic, LLVM 6.0.0)
title: Astebreed: Definitive Edition

notes: Graphics look great, sound and music are flawless, and the controls are perfect.  So far I've only tried the tutorials.
